blocks.body: Yes / No Questions — Questions with a yes/no answer.

{ "title": "9. Brief synopsis", "items": [ "Yes/No Questions — questions with the answer \"yes\" or \"no\". Are you...? Is she...? Were they...?", "Use the pattern in the examples.", "Use the pattern in the examples.", "With modals is a modal verb before the subject: Can you...? Will she...? Should we...?", "With have got — inversion of have/has: Have you got...? Has she got...?", "With Continuous — inversion of am/is/are/was/were: Are you working? Was she sleeping?", "With Perfect - inversion of have/has: Have you seen...? Has she finished...?", "Basic rule - the auxiliary verb always precedes the subject!" ] }
